positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized sacred geometry illustration of a cosmic flora arrangement. The main subject is a stylized, symmetrical archway of bioluminescent glowing plants, interwoven with abstract celestial elements, crescent moons, constellations, and geometric mandalas. The style must be a blend of elegant vector illustration and sacred geometry, rendered with crisp lines and strong, deep silhouettes. Use a limited, vibrant color palette of emerald green, deep sapphire blue, amethyst purple, and gold leaf accents. The composition must be centered and circular, emphasizing contrast against a solid, clean background. Clean lines, high detail, designed for apparel printing, graphic novel aesthetic, flat composition, negative space utilization.
